nodes.name: Speckled tanager
nodes.summary: Speckled tanager（Speckled tanager，学名 Ixothraupis guttata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于丘倫貝洛斯山脈國家自然公園、哥伦比亚、次生林。
locations: 丘倫貝洛斯山脈國家自然公園

nodes.id: loc-丘倫貝洛斯山脈國家自然公園-be3380ca
nodes.name: 丘倫貝洛斯山脈國家自然公園
nodes.summary: 丘倫貝洛斯山脈國家自然公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Speckled tanager，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 哥伦比亚
nodes.summary: 哥伦比亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联947种鸟类，包括红头林䳍、灰䳍、白喉䳍等947种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: These two species are generally presumably to be fully allopatric, but may actually be parapatric: in 1998 a speckled tanager was found in the Serranía de los Churumbelos (Colombia), just about north of where spotted tanagers are known to occur.{{cite journal|author=Salaman, Paul G

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: These two species are generally presumably to be fully allopatric, but may actually be parapatric: in 1998 a speckled tanager was found in the Serranía de los Churumbelos (Colombia), just about north of where spotted tanagers are known to occur.{{cite journal|author=Salaman, Paul G

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Ixothraupis guttata is more of a subtropical species than its relative and occurs in humid montane and secondary forest, with generally not very tall trees and a dense understory. Speckled tanagers are social birds which eat mainly fruit and some insects
